problem_statement: The repository needs a valid full-chain fixture set for validator coverage.

questions.question: Should examples model the full workflow?
questions.answer: Yes, one valid full chain is required for v1.

risks: Fixture drift if validators change without example updates.

approach.decision: Ship a single valid chain plus targeted invalid fixtures
approach.rationale: This keeps coverage high without bloating the repo.

success_criteria.description: validate-artifact passes for every full-workflow artifact in the valid chain
success_criteria.expected_signal: Each valid fixture artifact prints PASS

success_criteria.description: review scope remains clean for the valid fixture chain
success_criteria.expected_signal: ReviewRecord.scope_match is true and scope_violations is empty

success_criteria.description: evaluation is human-confirmed before terminal state
success_criteria.expected_signal: EvaluationRecord.evaluation_status is confirmed and TaskManifest.phase is evaluated
